---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
engine: knitr
---

```{r}
#| include: false
1 + 1
```

::: {.hero-banner}

::: {.hero-eyebrow}
Business Analytics & AI
:::

# Javier [Bravo Bernal]{style="color:#c9a84c"}

::: {.hero-role}
Mechatronics Engineer · M.S. Business Analytics, Baruch College · Service Engineer @ Ecolab
:::

::: {.hero-desc}
I turn complex operational and business data into clear, actionable insight.
With a foundation in industrial engineering and a graduate focus on analytics
and AI, I bridge the gap between physical systems and data-driven decisions.
:::

::: {.hero-btns}
[View Projects](#projects){.btn-hero-gold}
[LinkedIn ↗](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598/){.btn-hero-outline target="_blank"}
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/jalfred259806){.btn-hero-outline target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.stat-grid}
::: {.stat-item}
[4+]{.stat-num}
[Years Industry Exp.]{.stat-label}
:::
::: {.stat-item}
[5]{.stat-num}
[Projects Published]{.stat-label}
:::
::: {.stat-item}
[M.S.]{.stat-num}
[Business Analytics]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

:::

---

## About {#about}

::: {.eyebrow}
01 — About
:::

::: {.column-page}
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-8}
I'm a **Mechatronics Engineer** with a career built across industrial automation,
quality control, and service engineering in both **Ecuador and New York City**.
My technical background includes PLC programming, electromechanical systems, and
sensor integration — fields where data is generated constantly but rarely analyzed
to its full potential.

That gap drove me toward data. I spent a year running the analytics side of a
**family healthcare business**, building dashboards in Python, SQL, and Tableau
that improved profitability by 8% and monthly revenue by 10% through demand
forecasting and customer behavior analysis.

Today I work as a **Service Engineer at Ecolab in New York**, designing digital
maintenance tracking systems and optimizing operations for enterprise clients.
In parallel, I'm completing my **M.S. in Business Analytics at Baruch College**,
deepening my skills in machine learning, statistical modeling, and AI-driven
decision making.

I'm actively seeking roles in **Business Analytics, Data Science, and AI** where
I can apply both my engineering precision and analytical toolkit to real business problems.
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
::: {.info-card}
#### Education

- M.S. Business Analytics *Baruch College · 2025–Present*
- B.S. Mechatronics Engineering *Tecnológico de Monterrey · 2017–2021*
- Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900) *Microsoft Certification*
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.gold-divider}
:::

---

## Skills {#skills}

::: {.eyebrow}
02 — Technical Toolkit
:::

::: {.column-page}
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
#### Analytics & BI
[Tableau]{.skill-pill .core}
[Power BI]{.skill-pill .core}
[Excel]{.skill-pill}
[ggplot2]{.skill-pill}
[Plotly]{.skill-pill}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
#### Programming
[Python]{.skill-pill .core}
[R]{.skill-pill .core}
[SQL]{.skill-pill .core}
[MATLAB]{.skill-pill}
[C]{.skill-pill}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
#### AI & Machine Learning
[Machine Learning]{.skill-pill .core}
[Deep Learning]{.skill-pill .core}
[scikit-learn]{.skill-pill}
[TensorFlow]{.skill-pill}
[Neural Networks]{.skill-pill}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
#### Data Engineering
[Pandas]{.skill-pill}
[tidyverse]{.skill-pill}
[tidycensus]{.skill-pill}
[ETL Pipelines]{.skill-pill}
[Data Cleaning]{.skill-pill}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
#### Cloud & Platforms
[Microsoft Azure]{.skill-pill .core}
[Azure DP-900]{.skill-pill}
[GitHub]{.skill-pill}
[Quarto]{.skill-pill}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
#### Engineering
[Allen Bradley PLC]{.skill-pill}
[TIA Portal]{.skill-pill}
[SCADA / HMI]{.skill-pill}
[SolidWorks]{.skill-pill}
[LabVIEW]{.skill-pill}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.gold-divider}
:::

---

## Projects {#projects}

::: {.eyebrow}
03 — Selected Work
:::

::: {.column-page}
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.proj-card}
[Project · 01 · Tableau · Marketing Analytics]{.proj-num}
#### Numismática México — Holiday Sales Strategy
Analyzed four years of sales data for a Mexican numismatics retailer using
Tableau. Identified the star product, quantified ad lift, mapped
state-level preferences, and produced a focused Q4 marketing playbook.

::: {.proj-tags}
[Tableau]{.proj-tag .gold}
[Marketing Analytics]{.proj-tag}
[Data Storytelling]{.proj-tag}
[Business Strategy]{.proj-tag}
:::

[Read Analysis →](projects/numismatica-mexico.html){.proj-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.proj-card}
[Project · 02 · Python · Machine Learning]{.proj-num}
#### Credit Risk Classification — German Credit Dataset
End-to-end scikit-learn ML pipeline benchmarking Logistic Regression,
Random Forest, and SVM on 1,000 loan applications. Explores the
recall trade-off when the cost of a missed bad loan is asymmetric.

::: {.proj-tags}
[Python]{.proj-tag .gold}
[scikit-learn]{.proj-tag}
[Classification]{.proj-tag}
[Cross-Validation]{.proj-tag}
:::

[Read Analysis →](projects/credit-risk.html){.proj-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.proj-card}
[Project · 03 · R · Policy Analytics]{.proj-num}
#### Campus Diversity After SFFA — National Enrollment Study
Measured the demographic impact of the Supreme Court's affirmative action
ruling using 15 years of IPEDS data across 3,000+ U.S. institutions.
Separates policy effects from long-term demographic trends.

::: {.proj-tags}
[R]{.proj-tag .gold}
[IPEDS]{.proj-tag}
[Policy Analysis]{.proj-tag}
[tidyverse]{.proj-tag}
:::

[Read Analysis →](projects/mp01.html){.proj-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.proj-card}
[Project · 04 · R · Behavioral Analytics]{.proj-num}
#### How Americans Spend Their Time — 20 Years of ATUS Data
Mined two decades of BLS time-use microdata to analyze how full-time
workers balance work, sleep, and leisure. Reveals persistent gender gaps
and the delta between ideal and actual daily time allocation.

::: {.proj-tags}
[R]{.proj-tag .gold}
[ATUS]{.proj-tag}
[ggplot2]{.proj-tag}
[Labor Economics]{.proj-tag}
:::

[Read Analysis →](projects/mp02.html){.proj-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.proj-card}
[Project · 05 · R · Demographic Forecasting]{.proj-num}
#### US Internal Migration & Congressional Reapportionment
Built a migration-based demographic model using ACS flow data to forecast
2030 state populations and predict which states gain or lose seats in
the 2032 congressional reapportionment via Huntington-Hill.

::: {.proj-tags}
[R]{.proj-tag .gold}
[tidycensus]{.proj-tag}
[Forecasting]{.proj-tag}
[ACS Data]{.proj-tag}
:::

[Read Analysis →](projects/mp03.html){.proj-link}
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.gold-divider}
:::

---

## Experience {#experience}

::: {.eyebrow}
04 — Professional History
:::

::: {.column-page}
::: {.timeline}

::: {.tl-item}
[2024 – Present]{.tl-date}
#### Service Engineer
[Ecolab · New York, NY]{.tl-company}

- Designed a digital maintenance tracking system reducing equipment downtime by 15%.
- Led troubleshooting and installation of complex electromechanical systems.
- Improved team productivity by 20% through mentoring and structured diagnostics.
- Collaborated with sales and operations to align technical solutions with client needs.
:::

::: {.tl-item}
[2022 – 2024]{.tl-date}
#### Quality Control Engineer
[Inglemed · Ecuador]{.tl-company}

- Diagnosed electromechanical faults in X-ray equipment; reduced error rates by 12%.
- Validated technical solutions against national regulatory standards.
- Maintained and updated technical documentation and system schematics.
:::

::: {.tl-item}
[2021 – 2022]{.tl-date}
#### Business Operations & Data Analyst
[Family Healthcare Business · Ecuador]{.tl-company}

- Built Python, SQL, and Tableau dashboards to optimize inventory and customer retention.
- Increased profitability by 8% through cost optimization modeling and supplier analysis.
- Improved monthly revenue by 10% using demand forecasting and behavioral analytics.
:::

::: {.tl-item}
[2017 – 2021]{.tl-date}
#### Electrical Engineer — Industrial Maintenance
[Ceramic Plant · Ecuador]{.tl-company}

- Programmed and maintained Allen Bradley PLCs controlling production line equipment.
- Managed maintenance of industrial motors, sensors, and electromechanical systems.
- Reduced unplanned downtime through preventive maintenance scheduling.
:::

:::
:::

::: {.gold-divider}
:::

---

## Contact {#contact}

::: {.eyebrow}
05 — Get In Touch
:::

::: {.column-page}
::: {.contact-panel}

### Open to opportunities.

::: {.contact-sub}
Actively seeking roles in Business Analytics, Data Science, and AI.  
Based in New York City. Open to hybrid and remote positions.
:::

[Email]{.c-badge} [jsvierbravo25@hotmail.com](mailto:jsvierbravo25@hotmail.com){.c-link}

[Phone]{.c-badge} [347-677-7946](tel:+13476777946){.c-link}

[LinkedIn]{.c-badge} [linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598/){.c-link target="_blank"}

[GitHub]{.c-badge} [github.com/jalfred259806](https://github.com/jalfred259806){.c-link target="_blank"}

:::
:::

---

*Last updated: `r format(Sys.time(), "%B %d, %Y")`*
